style_safety_policy: Universal craft controls only; no author names, titles, exact phrases, named entities, or style-mimicking instructions. Distilled from surface-level craft patterns visible across the text, not deep stylistic analysis of any individual's voice.
pov_and_distance: {'primary_pov': 'Close third-person limited through protagonist', 'internal_access': 'Frequent internal monologue with colloquial/profane interjections for tonal contrast', 'distance_calibration': "Reader occupies protagonist's perceptual field during action sequences; granted wider awareness only when AI-exposition delivers mythological context", 'omniscience_timing': 'Narrator retreats to protagonist-only focus during creature pursuit; expands scope briefly during lore delivery before contracting again'}
sentence_rhythm: {'action_register': 'Short, punchy declarative sentences typically 3-8 words during chase/pursuit sequences', 'dialogue_register': 'Varied length mirroring natural speech patterns; protagonist responses brief, AI explanations longer', 'exposition_register': 'Extended explanatory passages 2-4 sentences using theoretical frameworks and cause-effect chains', 'rhythmic_pattern': 'Alternating short-long-short creates acceleration during tension; longer passages provide breathing room before next threat beat', 'pacing_technique': 'Ellipsis deployed before revelation moments to create micro-pause; em-dashes used for interrupted action'}
paragraphing: {'break_markers': 'Scene transitions marked with chapter heading markers rather than whitespace or symbols', 'action_paragraphs': 'Short paragraphs (1-3 sentences) for kinetic impact during pursuit', 'exposition_paragraphs': 'Longer unbroken passages during AI lore delivery, 4-7 sentences', 'pacing_breaks': 'Ellipsis (...) used mid-scene to indicate temporal compression or psychological pause', 'thread_interweaving': 'Multiple plot threads (creature pursuit, Schmidt threat, ally recruitment) layered without clear scene breaks or paragraph reset'}
dialogue_system: {'primary_method': 'Challenge-rebuttal debate pattern between protagonist and AI companion', 'protagonist_role': 'Questions, doubts, challenges; grounds exposition in immediate survival concern', 'ai_role': 'Delivers theoretical frameworks, mythological backstory, creature analysis through response to challenges', 'tension_function': 'Disagreement creates micro-delay before crucial information, building anticipation', 'information_hierarchy': "Protagonist's immediate tactical needs drive question sequence; AI's responses expand outward to mythological/lore context"}
description_strategy: {'sensory_focus': 'Minimal sensory description overall; primary attention to action consequences and character reactions', 'environmental_shading': "Physical surroundings rendered only as they affect protagonist's movement or threat assessment", 'creature_description': "Conveyed through movement consequences and AI's analytical framing rather than direct sensory portrait", 'reaction_priority': "Protagonist's emotional/physical response to events takes precedence over objective scene description", 'implication_over_literal': "Reader infers threat level through protagonist's fear responses rather than explicit danger description"}
exposition_strategy: {'delivery_vehicle': 'AI companion character provides all mythological/theoretical framework exposition', 'explanation_type': 'Theoretical frameworks (evolutionary instinct, species-wide energy manipulation) rather than direct narrative history', 'placement': 'Exposition delivered during action pauses or escape sequences; tied to immediate protagonist questions', 'myth_recontextualization': 'Founding legends revealed as literal historical events with modern threat implications', 'thread_seeding': 'Exposition introduces secondary antagonist threats (technical destruction device) alongside primary creature lore', 'volume_constraint': 'Single chapter introduces multiple unresolved plot threads (creature origin, Schmidt threat, ancestral legend) without immediate resolution'}
emotional_temperature: {'dominant_tone': 'Sustained tension during creature pursuit, punctuated by intellectual engagement during AI exposition', 'protagonist_emotion': 'Fear-driven self-preservation during chase; wounded pride surfacing during ally encounters', 'arc_emotional_trajectory': 'Humiliation → vindication-seeking → dangerous mission commitment', 'ally_emotional_state': 'Wounded pride from manipulated assassination revelation transforms into cause commitment', 'reader_emotional_contract': 'Constant threat awareness maintained while providing lore satisfaction; cliffhanger ends prevent resolution closure'}
hooking_and_transitions: {'chapter_hook': "Mid-action cliffhanger with creature's approach as imminent threat; chapter ends without narrative resolution", 'suspense_mechanism': 'Threat approaches during exposition delivery; reader uncertain whether protagonist survives long enough to receive information', 'thread_transitions': 'Multiple plot threads woven together without clear scene break demarcation', 'reader_uncertainty': 'Sustained through unresolved threads: creature pursuit outcome, Schmidt device threat, ancestral legend connection', 'attention_allocation': 'Alternates between visceral chase tension and intellectual lore satisfaction to prevent either from overwhelming'}
adaptation_guidelines: {'mechanism_extraction': 'AI-exposition-through-debate pattern adaptable to any protagonist-companion pairing requiring lore delivery', 'emotional_arc_template': 'Wounded-pride-to-redemption-through-mission arc requires: initial humiliation event, revelation of manipulation, commitment trigger, dangerous mission framing', 'pursuit_tension_calibration': 'Interweave exposition delivery with ongoing threat to prevent static lore-d'}
taboo_copy_signals: source titles, author names, exact phrases, named entities, and distinctive sentence templates
